Flow.interviewLabel: DM MultiData Bar Chart - Grant Spend {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: DM MultiData Bar Chart - Grant Spend

textTemplates.name: txtSHF_KPI_Text
textTemplates.text:
﻿{!varKPI_Title}


{!varKPI1_Heading} - {!Get_Award.No_of_Homes_Suitable_For_Retrofit__c}

{!varKPI2_heading} - {!Get_Award.No_of_Homes_Ready_For_Installs_To_Start__c}

{!varKPI3_Heading} - {!Get_Award.No_of_Homes_Started_Installations__c}

{!varKPI4_heading} - {!Get_Award.No_of_Homes_All_Installations_Completed__c}

{!varKPI5_heading} - {!Get_Award.No_of_Homes_Completed__c}

{!varKPI_HomesToGo} - {!flaHomestoGo}
